title: Review: project-LICHEN 2026-07-06
description:
Review of key rotation fix in python/src/lichen/announce/processor.py.

**The fix is correct and secure.** It changes Step 3 from rejecting pin mismatches to accepting them with a warning, which is appropriate because Step 1 already cryptographically verifies IID = hash(pubkey). A pin mismatch would require a SHA-256 collision.

**Findings:**
- 2 issues filed (both P1)
- 0 correctness bugs in the fix itself
- 1 broken test (tests wrong IID)
- 1 dead code concern (unpin/KEY_CHANGE_DETECTED serve no purpose)

**Review confidence:** 15% chance of missed bug.
**Least confident areas:** Interaction with link_layer.py which has identical pin logic.
**Would raise confidence if:** Also reviewed link_layer.py key pinning behavior.
